metadata.description: Personal marketplace hosting the llm-wiki plugin (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as a Claude Code plugin).

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as a Claude Code plugin. Bootstrap, maintain, query, research, and lint plain-markdown personal knowledge bases. Six slash commands (/llm-wiki:init, /llm-wiki:ingest, /llm-wiki:query, /llm-wiki:research, /llm-wiki:lint, /llm-wiki:list) and one auto-loading skill. Obsidian is the reading IDE; Claude does the maintenance.
